title: WATCH:  President Trump says Democrats should be 'ashamed'
fullText: President Trump says Democrats should be 'ashamed'Trump called on Congress to "show your support" when referring to the government to protect U.S. citizens first. When Rep. Ilhan Omar did not stand or clap, Trump said, “You should be ashamed."February 24, 2026
summary: Trump called on Congress to "show your support" when referring to the government to protect U.S. citizens first. When Rep. Ilhan Omar did not stand or clap, Trump said, “You should be ashamed."
